title: Embuttu Irukkuthu Aasai Lyrics Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen
stanzas:

<div>
Embuttu Irukkuthu Aasai Lyrics Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen

Embuttu irukkudhu aasa
un mela, adha kaatta poren.
ambuttu azhagaiyum neenga
thaalaatta, kodiyeththa vaaren.

ullatha koduthava
yaengum podhu
ummunu irukkuriye.

chellatha irunthukka
kaekka venaam
ammammaa asathuriye

Embuttu irukkudhu aasa
un mela, adha kaatta poren.
ambuttu azhagaiyum neenga
thaalaatta, kodiyeththa vaaren.

kallam kabadam illa unakku
enna irukkuthu melum pesa.
pallam arinju vellam vadiya
sokki kedakkuren dhegam koosa.

thottu kalandhida
nee thuninjaa
moththa ulagaiyum
paarthidalaam

solli koduthida
nee irundhaa
sorga kadhavaiyum
saathidalaam

munna paakkaathatha
ippo nee kaattida
vesam pola yeruthe
sandhosam.

Embuttu irukkudhu aasa
un mela, adha kaatta poren.
ambuttu azhagaiyum neenga
thaalaatta, kodiyeththa vaaren.

oththa lightum
unna nenachi
kuththu velakkena
maari pochu

kannu kadhaippu
enna parikka
nenjukuli adhu
veedu aachu.

paththu thala konda
raavanaa unna rasikkanum
thookki vandhu.

manjal kayir onnu
pottuputtu enna
irutilum nee arundhu.

solla koodaathatha
solli yaen kaattura
malaiyera yaengura
unkooda.

Embuttu irukkudhu aasa
un mela, adha kaatta poren.
ambuttu azhagaiyum neenga
thaalaatta, kodiyeththa vaaren.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of love and affection, highlighting the beauty of romantic emotions.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen, the song plays during a romantic sequence, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Kalyani Nair and Sean Roldan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Embuttu Irukkuthu Aasai is composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 31, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Embuttu Irukkuthu Aasai beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and desire, making it a perfect fit for romantic moments in the film. It showcases the playful banter and affection between the characters, evoking feelings of joy and warmth. The melodious voices of Kalyani Nair and Sean Roldan, combined with D Imman's enchanting composition, create a memorable listening experience. This track is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Embuttu Irukkuthu Aasai from Saravanan Irukka Bayamaen is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. The unique collaboration between Kalyani Nair and Sean Roldan, under the musical genius of D Imman, creates a captivating vibe that resonates with listeners. This song is sure to elevate your mood and make you feel the warmth of affection.
stanzaMeanings: I have a desire that is focused on you, I will show it. I will also bring your beautiful face to light, I will make it shine.
The one who gave me my heart is always with you.
I don't want to hear from you, grandma, about the troubles.
The person who is causing trouble is here.
I have a desire that is focused on you, I will show it. I will also bring your beautiful face to light, I will make it shine.
There is no burden for you, what do you have to say? I am feeling light and carefree, my body is relaxed.
If you touch and connect, we can see the whole world.
If you give me a chance, we can enjoy the gates of heaven.
Now that you are showing yourself, it feels like happiness is coming.
I have a desire that is focused on you, I will show it. I will also bring your beautiful face to light, I will make it shine.
The light has changed, thinking of you, it has become bright.
What is the story of my eyes, my heart is worried, it has become a home.
The one with ten heads, Ravana, has come to admire you.
With a yellow thread, you have tied me up in your embrace.
Why do you show what should not be said, oh mountain, what are you doing with me?
I have a desire that is focused on you, I will show it. I will also bring your beautiful face to light, I will make it shine.
